untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options spread strategy (short put + long call synthetic) with strike-based entry/exit logic. The backtest engine appears to be equity/price-based only. Strike prices, option premiums, net credits, and expiration-based exits cannot be translated to price/technical indicator conditions without losing the core mechanics of the strategy. Recommend implementing as a dedicated options backtester module.
translation_notes: Signal requires options contract mechanics (defined strikes, premiums, net credits, expiration handling) which are not representable in this price-action/indicator framework. The bullish bias was approximated with RSI < 50 and price above SMA_20, but this loses the precise risk/reward structure of the original collar strategy.
